name: Pears and Cream Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cream cheese and black raspberry liqueur until smooth.
2. Slice the pears in half lengthwise.
3. Hollow out the centers of the pear halves using a teaspoon or melon baller.
4. Brush the pear surfaces with lemon juice to prevent browning.
5. Fill each pear half with the cream cheese mixture.
6. Sprinkle chopped pistachio nuts over the pears.
7. Garnish with mint leaves.
